description: A multi-role skill-swap platform interface with stagiaire, mentor, formateur, and admin areas built from static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files.

notes: All interface folders present and accounted for.
Legal and recherche assets added (legal.css, recherche.css, recherche.js).
Aide page added to stagiaire section.

assets.js: Shared and page-specific client-side behavior (23 files).
assets.images: Static image assets used across the interface (1 file).

main_folders.pages_stagiaire: Stagiaire-facing pages including dashboard, login, profile, notifications, requests, help, and legal pages (17 files).
main_folders.pages_mentor: Mentor-facing pages including dashboard, marketplace, requests, badges, and help (10 files).
main_folders.pages_admin: Administrative pages for account management, moderation, dashboard, and statistics (6 files).
main_folders.formateur_pages: Trainer/formateur pages for catalogue, dashboard, validation, search, and statistics (7 files).

shared_design_system.layout_pattern: fixed sidebar (248px) + sticky topbar (64px) + main content area
shared_design_system.colors: Blue-based palette (#0066CC primary) with neutral grays for borders, backgrounds, and text
shared_design_system.typography: Inter font from Google Fonts, consistent sizing across pages

fully_implemented: Complete shared CSS and JS assets across all roles
Responsive layout with sidebar + topbar pattern
17 stagiaire pages with full UI implementation
10 mentor pages with marketplace and request management
6 admin pages with moderation and account management
7 formateur pages with catalogue and validation workflows
Default avatar system for user profiles
known_follow_up_work: Request submission and badge management workflows

important_notes: Pure static frontend — no build system, no package manager, no bundler.
Open any .html file directly in browser or use VS Code Live Server (port 5501).
All color and spacing values use CSS custom properties defined in dashboard.css.
French UI language with mixed French/English filenames (intentional convention).
Some misspellings in original design (e.g., 'pages_stagiere' vs 'pages_stagiaire') left as-is per project requirements.
Hidden directories (.gemini, .opencode, .vscode) not part of source delivery.
MySQL schema defined in ismo_skillswap.sql (18 tables, utf8mb4 encoding).

development_workflow.local_preview: VS Code Live Server on http://localhost:5501
development_workflow.styling: Modify assets/css/dashboard.css for tokens, then page-specific .css files
development_workflow.behavior: Edit assets/js/dashboard.js for shared patterns, page-specific .js files for unique behavior
development_workflow.conventions: Use aria-current='page' for active nav, aria-label for sidebar/topbar, 'use strict' in all JS
